utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So , this must be kinda neat for you , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , your Dad tells me that you get a couple of days off school , and you , you ah , do not have to sell those cookies anymore .

utterances.speaker: Sarah
utterances.text: Well , I kinda wanted to sell the cookies . The girl who sells the most wins a trip to Spacecamp , and gets to sit in a real space shuttle .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I kinda wanted to sell the cookies . The girl who sells the most wins a trip to Spacecamp , and gets to sit in a real space shuttle .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wow , you ah , you really like all this space stuff , huh ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_you really like all this space stuff

utterances.speaker: Sarah
utterances.text: My Dad says if I spend as much time helping him clean apartments , as I do daydreaming about outer space , he would be able to afford a trip to the Taj Mahal .

emotion_cause.span: 6_My Dad says if I spend as much time helping him clean apartments , as I do daydreaming about outer space , he would be able to afford a trip to the Taj Mahal .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I think you would have to clean a whole lot of apartments to go all the way to India .

utterances.speaker: Sarah
utterances.text: No . The one in Atlantic City , Dad loves the slots . He says he is gonna double the college money my Grandma left me .
